docs.name: Border Beam
docs.description: A glowing comet that continuously orbits the border of a container — instantly upgrades cards, code blocks, and feature sections.

props.name: size
props.description: Diameter of the glowing orb in px.

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: Width of the container border in px.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes on the container.

docs.overview: BorderBeam traces an animated glowing orb around the perimeter of any container using requestAnimationFrame. Wrap any card, input, or panel to give it a dynamic, premium border highlight.

scenarios.title: Glowing feature card
scenarios.description: Surround a feature card with a colour-shifting comet beam that draws the eye.

scenarios.title: Highlighted input field
scenarios.description: Make an email or search input stand out with an animated beam instead of a static focus ring.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Decorative border layer; no interactive surface.
